name: Nippon Crucible Co., Ltd.
summary: Nippon Crucible Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells refractory products primarily in Japan. The company offers refractory products for non-ferrous metals, ferrous metals, iron and steel making, and incinerators and fusion furnaces. It is also involved in engineering business comprising the design, manufacture, and sale of refractories for metal melting industrial furnaces, induction furnaces, and incinerators and fusion furnaces, as well as provision of maintenance and repair services for furnaces. In addition, the company manufactures and sells monolithic refractories, such as trough materials and tap hole mixtures; and aluminum rapid melting furnaces. Further, it engages in real estate business. The company also exports its refractory products to Korea, China, Taiwan, Thailand, Indonesia, the Philippines, Australia, the United States, and Europe. Nippon Crucible Co., Ltd. was founded in 1885 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
